title: Forge Config [LegacyFabric]
description: Port config system from forge to legacy Fabric
body:
ForgeConfig mod is a modding library for mod developers that provides Forge's whole config system to other modding ecosystems. Allows developers to use Forge configs on LegacyFabric & FishModLoader.

This mod is similar to the [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port), although it was developed without referencing the Forge Config API Port.

This mod is ported from Forge 9.11.1.1345.

This Mod was originally made for [1.6.4-MITE](https://avernite.ca/MITE/) and [BTWCE3.x](https://modrinth.com/mod/btwce), but it can also work without relying on these two mods.

This mod does not rely on Minecraft and can theoretically run on any Fabric/Legacy Fabric version. It can also run on the FishModLoader for 1.6.4-MITE. However, because Forge configs differs significantly across different MC versions, it is recommended to use this mod with MC1.6.4 whenever possible.
